title: FPVEffect
body:
# FPVEffect
### - (kinda) Realistic FPV Effect Simulation

[Requires Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## **Commands:**

```
/fpv toggle true - Enables FPV Effect
/fpv toggle false - Disables FPV Effect
/fpv signal 1.0-0.0 - Decides the Strength of the FPV signal
```
